feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom API based on BO with custom (read) logic
entry.content:
To start with the big question:
Can I use both an existing BO interface and custom CRUD (so including Read) methods?
If not, is a completely unmanaged implementation the only feasible alternative?

And then for the bit of context:
We are currently in the process of moving several customers from their on-premise systems to the public cloud environment. The starting point of any public cloud implementation is "stick to standard", making use of public API's to interact with the SAP system.

In the past, they have of course used all the flexibility at their disposal, meaning loads of ZBAPI's to tackle client-specific logic. We can't completely remove all this logic, so are looking into our options to create custom APIs in which we can still adjust the behavior for all CRUD operations. Note the 'R' here, we also want to be able to adjust the data being retrieved during a READ operation.

An existing BO sounds like a great starting point, as the standard coding for CRUD should do fine in most cases and saves time. As a first go, I'm trying to create one for the Product BO, represented by I_ProductTP_2. To be able to filter on fields, I create a new root view entity with reference to that BO. By using an existing BO, it has to be a projection instead of a select.

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Product custom projection'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

define root view entity zp_product_custom
provider contract transactional_query
as projection on I_ProductTP_2
{
  key Product,
  ProductType,
  (...) etc.
}

Followed by a behavior definition, which in turn has to be of type projection as well:

projection implementation in class zcl_product_custom unique;
strict ( 2 );

define behavior for zp_product_custom alias Product
{
  use create;
  use update;
}

There is no 'read' behavior. That could only be added using an unmanaged implementation, but the projection part prevents me from using that type. Trying to implement a read method anyway, results in the message that "ZP_PRODUCT_CUSTOM" has the implementation type "projection", hence the implementation type "READ" is superfluous". Tried several approaches so far, all run into technical issues in the end.

Testing the custom API using Postman, I can use it to read data, that works out of the box with the default BO implementation. No method to adjust that data anywhere in the process so far. The create method would possibly work, but Postman is giving me some trouble there... let's say that's a work in progress. Focusing on the read method now.

So coming back to the initial question... is this even possible, or is an unmanaged implementation (forcing me to write all the data handling myself) be the only alternative?

entry.title: Cannot add Search Help to Custom Field - "No suitable value help key field exists" error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I made a Custom Field in the customizing client of our dev system (S/4HANA Public Cloud - 3 system landscape) through the Custom Fields app. I have a requirement to add search help to this custom field. For this purpose, I made a custom CDS view through the Custom CDS Views app. However, when I try to bind this CDS through the "Value Help View" field, the error message "No suitable value help key field exists" appears:

 

Here is the setup of my custom CDS view:

What am I missing? Any help is welcome. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Consume Odata V2 ord V4 in custom App Fiori deployed on Public Cloud
entry.content:
Good morning,


I am writing this post to try to have some information about the subject of the topic. In particular, I have developed a Custom Fiori application and I wanted to deploy and publish it on the Public Cloud. At the same time, I have activated on the same Public Cloud system an odata of the Business Application Hub via Communication System and Communication Arrangment. When I try to deploy the app with the odata exposed on the system(with the endpoit that i obteined during the configuration), I get an error related to the odata. Is there something I am missing?

The errors that are returned to me are:

The use of Gateway OData V2 Service API_BUSINESS_PARTNER 0001 is not permitted.

The app uses not permitted services for ABAP for Key Users

Solutions or suggestions?


Giuseppe.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Transportation Order Items custom field extension
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Greetings!

In public cloud Transportation Order Item app Unable to see custom field, after publishing custom field from SAP GUI.

Transportation Order Header able to see the custom field but same way unable to see item level.

so, please help me on this.

Thanks In Advance!

Regards,

entry.title: Enable Google Worksheets in S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are implementing S/4 Hana Public Cloud for a client, who is not ready to use the MS products (Teams, Mail, Excel, Word, etc.,).

For any data migrations or transactional data updates using the Excel sheets in SAP S/4 wanted to be replaced with the Google Sheets. 

Also, when the client wants to extract/download some master data or transaction data from the system by default it does not give an option to download it to Google worksheets.

So we need a way to enable this feature in the SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud for the Google space/Google worksheets enabled.

When I searched for this, I saw some external integrations needed with SAP Document Managed Services.

We also have the BTP and IS service in BTP used for this client. We can leverage these if required for the Google worksheets enablement in the client system SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud.

Any directions to do this are much appreciated.

 

Thank you,

Hanu

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud中GUI畫面的【調整使用者介面】問題
entry.content:
向各位專家請教關於 S/4HANA Public Cloud中GUI畫面的【調整使用者介面】，我有以下問題：
1. GUI畫面開啟【調整使用者介面】自行調整UI內容後，可以如何同步給其他USER看到？

2. 在【調整使用者介面】中新增的欄位(如下圖紅框)，有辦法將欄位資訊延伸至日記帳分錄文件中嗎？
以及新增的欄位有沒有可能新增至SAP標準API中，讓外部系統寫入銷售發票時，也可運用此新增欄位？

以上再麻煩專家給予回覆或建議，謝謝。

entry.title: api_warehouse_order_task_2
entry.content:
Hello

I need to use API api_warehouse_order_task_2 for cancel task, I use request 

In body I add this:

{
    "DirectWhseTaskConfIsAllowed": true
}
 
and have error back from SAP:

HTTP request look like:

What am I doing wrong?

entry.title: API ADT DELETE method
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
When exposing an internal table in ADT, the DELETE method doesn't seem to work in any case.
I get the message:

The specified HTTP method is not allowed for the resource identified by the Data Service Request URI.
But POST & GET are okay.
--> I tried with OData V4 & V2 - Web API.
--> use delete is set in table projection behavior.

Did I missed something?

Thanks for your guidance!
Sylvain

entry.title: Custom Flexible Workflow for Reservation in S/4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there a way to create a custom flexible workflow for Reservation (Procurement) in S/4 Public Cloud?
If not for Reservation, is there an alternative way to create a custom workflow?

Thanks in advance.
Regards,
Shankar

entry.title: How to add a field documentation in a custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to add in some field documentation into a custom analytical query report but failing to find any documentation on how to do this. Please see image below which shows what happens when I right-click => More field help. 

This is powered by a custom CDS view and please see the reference below for the field and annotations.

The label annotation is working but the quick info is not at the moment.

 

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

@EndUserText.label: 'Not Invoiced Amount'

@EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Quick Info'

NetUnitPrice * (cast(RequestedQuantity as abap.int8) - cast((case when _ItemQtys.InvoicedQty is null then 0 else _ItemQtys.InvoicedQty end) as abap.int8)) as NotInvoicedAmount,

entry.title: Email field in payment list output form
entry.content:
Hello, 

I need to create a new field in the payment list form FIN_FO_PAYM_LIST_V2 displaying Business partners' email from Business partner master data. The requirement is to have the email among the Payment details part of the form - see the red rectangle: 

I am able to edit the form itself in the Adobe LiveCycle Designer but I don't see any email field in the Data View: 

Could you please kindly advise me on how to do it? 

Many thanks

entry.title: How to change the original language of a development object in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Is there a way to change the original language of a development object in Eclipse ADT?

We're working on a s/4hana public cloud project atm and one of our developers has created a package in a certain language, there are lots of objects present in the package, deleting and recreating is not an option. I found below blog in which it's mentioned that this capability is in the backlog. I assume (hope) it has been developed by this point - 3 years later.

ADT/BTP ABAP Environment - How to change original ... - SAP Community

 

Thanks and regards

entry.title: How to get registered object information from an ABAP program in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi Exparts,

We are developing custom programs using Developer Extensibility in S/4HANA Public Edition.
We would like to develop programs to perform specific common operations on multiple custom tables.

In such cases, with Classic Extensibility, we could develop flexible functions by dynamically retrieving information from standard tables beginning with "DD".

I cannot find an alternative in Developer Extensibility, so if anyone has any information, please let me know.

Our specific need is to create a program that accesses information that was previously available from tables like:
- DD02L
- DD02T
- DD03L

Please let me know if there are ways to access via CDS views, standard classes, etc.

I would also like to refer to any materials that summarize how to retrieve various registered objects from ABAP programs, if there is one.

Best Regards,
Megumi Inoue

entry.title: Edit button Disabled in Business Configuration app in TEST and PROD system
entry.content:
Hi,
As per the tutorial provided by SAP to create a Business Configuration Application on top of the custom table was created and published successfully in the Customizing and Development tenants of the 3 - System Landscape of SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

When the create Business configuration application is opened in the Customizing / Development tenants, the Edit button is enabled and it is possible to add or delete records into the table and save them in a customizing request.

When this BC application is transported to the TEST and PROD systems by releasing the Workbench Transport from Eclipse and the Customizing Transport from the cloud the data and the table are available as expected in the TEST and PROD system.
But the Edit button is disabled in the TEST and PROD system.

As per the reference from the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-create-a-rap-bo-to-change-the-content-of-a-customizing-table-in-the/ba-p/13723087 it is clearly mentioned that the TEST and PROD systems are not made for customizing.

How can we make this edit button enabled in TEST and PROD systems? As whenever there is a change in data the user has to make changes in CUST system and capture them in a Customizing Transport and then export that transport to the next systems which in long run is not advisable.

As per the community blog mentioned above, where can we find the setting for adaptable in production to make the changes?

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.

entry.title: How to set validation in CO11N that Qty should not be Zero for Material with 261 Goods Movement ?
entry.content:
Hello All,

In SAP public cloud, during Production Order Confirmation (CO11N) - Quantity should not be "zero" in Goods movement tab for Materials with 261 Movement type.

How can this be achieved? Some Badi's have been searched for this requirement but not useful.

Let me know if anyone achieved this or can be done using "Screen Persona" Concept in public cloud,

Thankyou.

entry.title: 通过开发接口生成汇票日记账分录
entry.content:
Hi  ，

我希望通过开发接口生成汇票的日记账分录，如下面的手工会计分录样例：

 

我的问题：

1）汇票的日记账分录是否通过journalentrycreaterequestconfi接口可直接生成，若不是可通过哪个接口去生成？

 

我尝试通过journalentrycreaterequestconfi接口测试，但是，失败了，下面是测试用例以及返回的报错信息：

报错信息：

<soap-env:Envelope xmlns:soap-env="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">

   <soap-env:Header/>

   <soap-env:Body>

      <n0:JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation xmlns:n0="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN" xmlns:prx="urn:sap.com:proxy:M9P:/1SAI/TAS3D871C7855B59197A671:914">

         <MessageHeader>

            <UUID>59d07086-482c-1fe0-82dd-7ff0ed88cbf0</UUID>

            <CreationDateTime>2025-03-27T09:15:17.005142Z</CreationDateTime>

            <SenderBusinessSystemID>M9P</SenderBusinessSystemID>

         </MessageHeader>

         <ConfirmationInterfaceOrignName/>

         <JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>

            <MessageHeader>

               <UUID>59d07086-482c-1fe0-82dd-7ff0ed88ebf0</UUID>

               <CreationDateTime>2025-03-27T09:15:17.005176Z</CreationDateTime>

            </MessageHeader>

            <JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>

               <AccountingDocument>0000000000</AccountingDocument>

               <CompanyCode>1310</CompanyCode>

               <FiscalYear>2025</FiscalYear>

            </JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>

            <Log>

               <MaximumLogItemSeverityCode>3</MaximumLogItemSeverityCode>

               <Item>

                  <TypeID>609(RW)</TypeID>

                  <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>

                  <Note>Error in document: BKPFF $ 0M6CJLP</Note>

                  <WebURI>http://vhshpm9pci.shp02.sha.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=RW609&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV1=BKPFF&MSGV2=%24&MSGV3=0M6CJLP</WebURI>

               </Item>

               <Item>

                  <TypeID>246(F5)</TypeID>

                  <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>

                  <Note>Special G/L transactions of type W are not supported</Note>

                  <WebURI>http://vhshpm9pci.shp02.sha.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=F5246&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV1=W&MSGV2=W</WebURI>

               </Item>

            </Log>

         </JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>

         <Log/>

      </n0:JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation>

   </soap-env:Body>

</soap-env:Envelope>

 

 

测试用例：

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">

    <soapenv:Header/>

    <soapenv:Body>

        <sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>

            <MessageHeader>

                <!--创建时间-->

                <CreationDateTime>2025-03-24T08:00:01Z</CreationDateTime>

            </MessageHeader>

            <!--1 or more repetitions:-->

            <JournalEntryCreateRequest>

                <MessageHeader>

                    <!--创建时间-->

                    <CreationDateTime>2025-03-24T08:00:01Z</CreationDateTime>

                </MessageHeader>

                <JournalEntry>

                    <!--参考单据类型（固定值）-->

                    <OriginalReferenceDocumentType>BKPFF</OriginalReferenceDocumentType>

                    <!--事物类型（固定值）-->

                    <BusinessTransactionType>RFPI</BusinessTransactionType>

                    <!--会计凭证类型（固定值）-->

                    <AccountingDocumentType>DZ</AccountingDocumentType>

                    <!--合思单据编号-->

                    <DocumentReferenceID>WEB-1400000058</DocumentReferenceID>

                    <!--备注-->

                    <DocumentHeaderText>WEB测试-1400000058</DocumentHeaderText>

                    <!--创建者编号-->

                    <CreatedByUser>CB9980000015</CreatedByUser>

                    <!--公司代码-->

                    <CompanyCode>1310</CompanyCode>

                    <!--凭证日期-->

                    <DocumentDate>2025-03-24</DocumentDate>

                    <!--过账日期-->

                    <PostingDate>2025-03-24</PostingDate>

                    <!--税务确认时间-->

                    <TaxDeterminationDate>2025-03-24</TaxDeterminationDate>

                    <DebtorItem>

                        <!--行号-->

                        <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>

                        <!--客户编码-->

                        <Debtor>KH0001</Debtor>

                        <!--交易货币金额-->

                        <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="CNY">3000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>

                        <!--借贷方，H:贷方; S:借方-->

                        <DebitCreditCode>S</DebitCreditCode>

                        <!--单据行号描述-->

                        <DocumentItemText>Customer item 1</DocumentItemText>

                        <DownPaymentTerms>

                            <!--特殊标识 I为预收款，W为汇票-->

                            <SpecialGLCode>W</SpecialGLCode>

                        </DownPaymentTerms>

                    </DebtorItem>

                    <DebtorItem>

                        <!--行号-->

                        <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>

                        <!--客户编码-->

                        <Debtor>KH0001</Debtor>

                        <!--交易货币金额-->

                        <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="CNY">-3000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>

                        <!--借贷方，H:贷方; S:借方-->

                        <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>

                        <!--单据行号描述-->

                        <DocumentItemText>Customer item 1</DocumentItemText>

                        <DownPaymentTerms>

                            <!--特殊标识 I为预收款，W为汇票-->

                            <SpecialGLCode>A</SpecialGLCode>

                        </DownPaymentTerms>

                    </DebtorItem>

                </JournalEntry>

            </JournalEntryCreateRequest>

        </sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>

    </soapenv:Body>

</soapenv:Envelope>

entry.title: CDS的字段值显示问题
entry.content:
Hi All，

我基于数据源I_SalesDocumentItem 创建了CDS ，场景是外部API。 我选择了元素I_SalesDocumentItem.ShippingPoint，此时，我点击该CDS的按钮数据浏览器，预览数据是正确的。

但是，I_SalesDocumentItem.ShippingPoint只有代码，没有相应的名称，因此，我添加了I_SalesDocumentItem._ShippingPoint._Text.ShippingPointName，这样，我就可以查看名称了，但是，我再次在数据浏览器中查看数据，发现了数据错误，由于ShippingPoint在系统后台中维护了中、英的名称描述，结果，数据重复显示了，一行销售订单项目结果显示了两行。

大家有什么办法吗？要独立再创建一个ShippingPoint的API 的CDS？这样的工作量太大了。还有其他的字段存在同样的情况。

entry.title: Deploy SAP Fiori App on S/4 HANA Public Cloud with SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

@julieplummer20 @ariannamussobarcucci 

I am facing a weird problem when trying to deploy SAP Fiori app through SAP business application studio on S/4 HANA public cloud development tenant (080).  I am following the below tutorial but getting the error on Step 5 during the deployment.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-s4hanacloud-procurement-purchasereq-shop-ui.html

I have developed RAP application in Eclipse IDE and have connected SAP BTP and S/4 HANA cloud application to deploy the application. App has built successfully but when trying to deploy same, getting the below error.

error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'bind').
Please help me to understand the error and the steps to resolve the same.

Thank you in advance!

Thanks.

entry.title: Implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM is not called when we print custom output form
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We create an implementation of BADI MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM to pass the custom field data to the RFQ custom output form. When we create the output for RFQ, we have custom form printed but the BADI implementation was not called. We have checked through Custom Logic trace as well.

Do we need to perform any additional step to call the BADI implementation.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: I want to change the profit center of a sales document by item in Manage Substitution/Validation Rul
entry.content:
Manage Substitution/Validation Rules > Business Context
Profit Center Derivation in Sales Documents > Substitution Type: Substitute with field/function cannot be used

I can only use Substitute with Content

○What I want to do
I want the profit center of the details at the time of order to be "Sales office code + item profit center"

Please let me know the following:
1. Can it be used depending on how it's used?
2. How to use it
3. Is it scheduled to be released in the future?

Thank you in advance.
